endpoints.label: Availability Calendar

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: Start of the interval (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: End of the interval (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: outputFormat, timezone)

endpoints.description: If a time-slot is available in a calendar

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Start
fields.description: Start time of the event (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: End
fields.description: End time of the event (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: allday, attendees, color, conferenceDataUi, description, guestsCanInviteOthers, guestsCanModify, guestsCanSeeOtherGuests, id, location, maxAttendees, repeatFrecuency, repeatHowManyTimes, repeatUntil, rrule, sendUpdates, showMeAs, summary, visibility)

fields.label: Reminders
fields.description: If the event doesn't use the default reminders, this lists the reminders specific to the event (JSON object; supported keys: remindersValues, remindersValues.method, remindersValues.minutes)

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: sendUpdates)

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: maxAttendees, returnNextInstance, timeZone)

endpoints.label: Get Many Event

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: After
fields.description: At least some part of the event must be after this time, use expression to set a date, or switch to fixed mode to choose date from widget (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Before
fields.description: At least some part of the event must be before this time, use expression to set a date, or switch to fixed mode to choose date from widget (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: timeMin, timeMax, singleEvents, fields, iCalUID, maxAttendees, orderBy, query, recurringEventHandling, showDeleted, showHiddenInvitations, timeZone, updatedMin)

endpoints.description: Retrieve many events from a calendar

fields.label: Calendar
fields.description: Google Calendar to operate on (provide the ID)

fields.label: Update Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: allday, attendeesUi, attendees, color, description, end, guestsCanInviteOthers, guestsCanModify, guestsCanSeeOtherGuests, id, location, maxAttendees, repeatFrecuency, repeatHowManyTimes, repeatUntil, rrule, sendUpdates, showMeAs, start, summary, visibility)

fields.label: Reminders
fields.description: If the event doesn't use the default reminders, this lists the reminders specific to the event (JSON object; supported keys: remindersValues, remindersValues.method, remindersValues.minutes)
